event: Angelica carving Medoro's name on a tree (from Orlando Furioso)
symbols: carving names on a tree — the inscription of love, the desire for love to endure
palm tree — the exotic setting of the romance
description: A fresco within an ornate architectural frame. A young woman (Angelica) leans against a palm tree, reaching up to carve into its trunk. Beside her sits a young man (Medoro) in a reclining pose, looking up at her. The setting is pastoral with a blue sky, distant landscape, and warm golden light. The figures are dressed in loose classical-style garments. The fresco frame has elaborate rococo scrollwork and decorative elements in grey and gold. Birds fly in the sky above.

_meta.title: Angelica Carving Medoro's Name on a Tree
